completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` passes with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran `ruff check src/ tests/` — output: 'All checks passed!' with zero errors. No code changes were needed.
Ran `mypy src/` — output: 'Success: no issues found in 6 source files'. All type annotations are correct with strict mode enabled in pyproject.toml.

Ran `pytest tests/ -v` — 174 passed, 0 failed, 5 warnings (pytest mark registration warnings only). All test files: test_insight_extractor.py, test_insight_models.py, test_insights.py, test_mcp_tools.py.

Ran `pytest tests/ --cov=src --cov-report=term` — TOTAL coverage: 95% (167 statements, 8 missed). Breakdown: __init__.py: 100%, __main__.py: 79%, models/__init__.py: 100%, models/insight.py: 100%, services/__init__.py: 100%, services/insight_extractor.py: 100%. The 8 missed statements are in __main__.py (the `if __name__ == '__main__'` block and invalid max_insights error path). Overall 95% is well above 80% threshold.
Coverage report shows src/models/insight.py: 57 statements, 0 missed, 100% coverage. This exceeds the 90% threshold.
Coverage report shows src/services/insight_extractor.py: 72 statements, 0 missed, 100% coverage. This exceeds the 90% threshold.
